examples: A bit of benevolence from people in power is not what we need.
He viewed them with the manner of a fatherly pilot, his countenance radiant with benevolence.
How can one have benevolence in excess?
The Russian state, in its benevolence, granted the defense attorney the time he requested this week.
The foregone output from people standing in line and waiting is one of the costs of our benevolence.
